name: Curried Turkey, Fruit & Nut Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Turkey (cooked and shredded into bite-sized pieces)
1 large Papaya (halved, seeded, peeled, and sliced)
3 Kiwi (peeled and cut lengthwise in half, then sliced crosswise)
Fresh spinach leaves (stem washed and well drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together chutney, curry powder, and ginger in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to boiling over medium heat.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 2-3 minutes.
4. Cool slightly.
5. Stir in yogurt.
6. Place dressing in a large bowl; add turkey.
7. Refrigerate several hours.
8. Bake tortilla salad shells as directed on package.
9. Add papaya, kiwi, and almonds to the turkey mixture.
10. Line cooled tortilla bowls with spinach leaves.
11. Fill each shell with turkey mixture.
12. Serve immediately.
